name: Amphibious Swarmship Amblowhale
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>揚</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>陸</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>群</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぐん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>艦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>アンブロエール
desc:
2+ Effect Monsters
Gains 200 ATK for each Link Monster in the GYs. You can only use each of the following effects of "Amphibious Swarmship Amblowhale" once per turn.
● If this card is destroyed: You can target 1 Link-3 or lower monster in either GY; Special Summon it.
● If a Link-3 or lower monster(s) on the field is destroyed by battle or card effect while this card is in your GY: You can banish this card from your GY; destroy 1 card on the field.

sets.set: Dark Neostorm Sneak Peek Participation Card

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Requires Effect Monsters as Link Materials
Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
